arts.ttl: Analysis: Merino excelling as two players rolled into one for Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal’s second goal was a terrific example of how Merino can still impact matches from a strikers’ berth when playing in midfield. Merino has become one of Arsenal’s most important first-team players over the past couple of months and will aim to continue as such at home to Crystal Palace on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal dream Ousmane Dembele scenario unfolding ahead of PSG Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Everyone manages their emotions as best they can, or want to, or know how to," said Enrique, when asked about the possible frustration of the Ligue 1 top scorer. If Dembele is not at his best, it would give Arsenal a major boost in the Champions League semi-final.

arts.ttl: St George's Day: Palace's previous England representatives
arts.sum: This Wednesday, 23 April is St George's Day - the patron saint of England. To celebrate we're looking at those to have represented the Three Lions whilst also playing in the red and blue of Palace...

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique takes huge PSG injury risk before Arsenal Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Though full focus will not yet be on Arsenal, Enrique was asked if playing low blocks is good preparation for their European semi-final. In the lead up to the first leg however, PSG have been dealt a fixture nightmare as they are set to play a third game in just six days this Friday at home to Champions League challengers Nice.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard makes pointed dig as Arsenal captain opens up on Real Madrid victory
arts.sum: Arsenal secured a statement success over Real Madrid in the last eight of the Champions League with Martin Odegaard hailing their attacking approach in the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Champions League lining up THREE format changes for next season after complaint from Arsenal
arts.sum: The first season of the newly-expanded competition is reaching its conclusion with Arsenal, PSG, Barcelona and Inter Milan all in the hunt to be crowned champions of Europe.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils head coach Ruben Amorim 'determined to sign' Crystal Palace star
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim allegedly wants to bring Crystal Palace attacker Eberechi Eze to Old Trafford this summer.
